name: Dashi Delights Cat Treats – Tuna Variety 70g
shortDescription: Dashi Delights Chicken Recipe is a hydrating, grain-free cat food topper made with farm-raised chicken and bonito broth. Rich umami flavor with Vitamin E and antioxidants
description: Treat your cat to a flavorful experience with Dashi Delights Cat Tuna Variety Pack . Made with wholesome, high-quality ingredients , including farm-raised chicken and natural wild-caught tuna , these single-serve toppers bring umami-rich flavor to every meal. Each topper is crafted from a delicate bonito broth with shredded premium proteins, providing a hydrating, grain-free, preservative-free , and carrageenan-free treat your cat will adore. Enriched with Vitamin E for immune support and Green Tea Extract as a natural antioxidant, these toppers are perfect for cats of all life stages from kittens to seniors. Variety Pack Includes: Chicken with Tuna Recipe Chicken with Tuna & Salmon Recipe Chicken with Tuna & Scallop Recipe Hydrate your cat, enhance their meals, and provide a delicious boost of flavor with every serving. Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat or meal complement. Not intended as a complete meal. Provide fresh water daily and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve promptly. Ingredients Chicken with Tuna: Chicken, Tuna, Tapioca Starch, Natural Flavors, Guar Gum, Scallop Extract, Bonito Flakes, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Chicken with Tuna & Salmon: Chicken, Tuna, Salmon, Tapioca Starch, Natural Flavors, Guar Gum, Scallop Extract, Bonito Flakes, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Chicken with Tuna & Scallop: Chicken, Tuna, Scallop, Tapioca Starch, Natural Flavors, Guar Gum, Scallop Extract, Bonito Flakes, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Calorie Content & Analysis Crude Protein (min): 11.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.50% Crude Fiber (max): 0.10% Moisture (max): 88.00% Vitamin E (min): 50 IU/kg 500 kcal/kg, 35 kcal per cup (ME)
